final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire load, 
    input wire [4:0] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in;  // load data_in to data_out
    end
end

endmodule
